title: Classic British Roast Lamb
description: A traditional British-style roast lamb dish, perfect for special occasions.
instructions: Season the lamb leg with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large oven-safe pan over high heat.
Sear the lamb leg on all sides until browned, about 2-3 minutes per side.
Transfer the lamb leg to the preheated oven and roast for 20 minutes.
Reduce the oven temperature to 180°C (350°F) and continue roasting for an additional 20-25 minutes, or until the lamb reaches your desired level of doneness.
While the lamb is roasting, toss the potatoes with olive oil, salt, and pepper.
Spread the potatoes out in a single layer on a baking sheet and roast in the oven for 20-25 minutes, or until golden brown.
Remove the lamb and potatoes from the oven and let rest for 10 minutes before slicing and serving.
Garnish with fresh rosemary and roasted garlic before serving.
